items.title: I want to do some streams where I work with non-technical people using Claude Code to figure ou…
items.content: I want to do some streams where I work with non-technical people using Claude Code to figure out how they might be able to improve their process. My feeling is that just a few tips could make a big difference in efficiency. Any mutuals interested?

items.title: done about 10 of these calls so far + looked at more transcripts many learnings but one of the…
items.content: done about 10 of these calls so far + looked at more transcripts many learnings but one of the biggest is that it's very easy to spend a lot of tokens on open ended verification that doesn't make your output better I'll try and write more on how to do it efficiently https://t.co/VrBGOFDhIF

items.content: I want to do a few more of these calls. If your MAX 20x plan ran out of tokens unexpectedly early and you're willing to screenshare and run some prompts through Claude Code please comment. Trying to figure out how we can improve /usage to give more info. https://t.co/rufJ6vCJGT
